apple ovehanging alley, a lot of fruit this year, not tasty as of first week in August Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

large fig bush next to porch on private property, interesting owner open to making cuttings, hard to get in touch with though because dogs bark constantly and no one answers door! Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: June-September.

concord grape on low fence in rear and side of private home, nice lady who let me take a couple cuttings (she was outside chopping back raspberry canes when i met her that day) Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
unharvested pear on private property, fenced-in backyard Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
large pear tree, unharvested, private fenced in back yard Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
